enabled.description: Indicates whether to not retry sending batches in case of export failure.

initial_interval.description: The time to wait after the first failure before retrying.

max_elapsed_time.description: The maximum amount of time (including retries) spent trying to send a request/batch. Once this value is reached, the data is discarded. If set to 0, the retries are never stopped.

max_interval.description: The upper bound on backoff interval. Once this value is reached the delay between consecutive retries will always be `MaxInterval`.

multiplier.description: The value multiplied by the backoff interval bounds

randomization_factor.description: A random factor used to calculate next backoffs Randomized interval = RetryInterval * (1 ± RandomizationFactor)

back_off_config.description: Defines configuration for retrying batches in case of export failure. The current supported strategy is exponential backoff.
